checks.description: Pulse width guardrail: data_out may be asserted only after a data_in high pulse that lasts exactly one cycle and is surrounded by low cycles.
notes: Spec describes a 3-cycle pattern; contract timing is ambiguous, so enforce a bounded range.
checks.pass_condition: Whenever data_out transitions to 1, it must be preceded by a data_in rising edge followed by a falling edge within 2 to 4 clock cycles, and data_out must return to 0 before the next pulse.
After a single data_in high pulse, data_out should transition to 1 within a conservative observation window and then return to 0.
checks.trigger_condition: When a legal input pattern (single high pulse) is applied to data_in.
